project_overview.domain: Special Education Services Landing Page & Admin
project_overview.goal: High-conversion lead generation via WhatsApp, emphasizing credibility, empathy, and professional authority.

rules: No generic gradients. Use the background colors provided (#B3D3D9, #E3F0F2, #D0E0E4) to alternate sections.
All CTAs must use #C7A562 (Golden/Bronze) with #FFFFFF or #0D3B3B text (check contrast).
Text must predominantly be #0D3B3B for high readability.
Hover states for CTAs should increase lightness of #C7A562 by 10-15%.

headings.usage: Use for Hero H1, Section H2s, Testimonial Quotes. Creates an authoritative, premium, and trustworthy feel.

body.usage: Use for all body copy, forms, buttons, and admin dashboard. High accessibility and friendly.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold leading-none text-[#0D3B3B]
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold leading-tight text-[#0D3B3B]

layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for soft, empathetic shapes
layout_and_spacing.grid_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 md:gap-8

buttons.primary: bg-[#C7A562] text-white hover:bg-[#b09257] transition-colors duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold text-lg flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.whatsapp_floating: fixed bottom-6 right-6 bg-[#C7A562] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-2xl hover:scale-110 transition-transform z-50 flex items-center justify-center h-16 w-16

cards.surface: bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(13,59,59,0.08)] border border-[#0D3B3B]/5

admin_dashboard.strategy: Shadcn UI based. Clean, functional, and intuitive.
admin_dashboard.sidebar: Fixed left sidebar, bg-[#0D3B3B] text-white, #C7A562 for active states.
admin_dashboard.cards: Shadcn Card components with sharp or slightly rounded corners (rounded-lg).
admin_dashboard.drag_drop: Use a library like dnd-kit for reordering sections.

page_sections.layout: Two-column on desktop (Text left, Image right). Left-aligned text.
page_sections.elements: H1, Overline, Subtitle, Primary WhatsApp CTA Button, Trust Badges.
page_sections.image_requirement: High-quality professional teacher portrait or abstract educational background.

page_sections.layout: Grid 3 to 4 columns showing big numbers.
Grid of cards highlighting who this is for (e.g., Parents, Specific conditions).
Vertical timeline or horizontal step-by-step 1-2-3 bento.
page_sections.elements: Step Numbers in bold Playfair Display, Connective lines.
Why choose me? Authority markers, bespoke methods.

page_sections.layout: Carousel (Swiper.js) of cards to show social proof.
page_sections.elements: Star ratings, quote, parent name, student improvement metric.

page_sections.layout: Two-column. Image left, text right. High authority.
page_sections.elements: Professional headshot, H2 (Meet the Teacher), Biography, Qualifications list.
H2, Subtitle, massive Golden CTA (#C7A562) button.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling.
motion_and_interactions.reveal: Framer Motion. Fade in and slide up (y: 20) on scroll using viewport once:true.
motion_and_interactions.hover: Scale up images slightly inside overflow-hidden wrappers. Cards lift on hover.

accessibility_and_testing.test_attributes: All interactive elements must have a data-testid. E.g., data-testid='hero-whatsapp-btn', data-testid='admin-toggle-hero'.

hero_abstract_bg.description: Abstract light blue and golden geometric educational background.
hero_abstract_bg.usage: Hero section background image or side illustration.

teacher_portrait.description: Professional warm portrait of a special education teacher.

educational_3d_tools.description: 3D minimalist educational tools (book, graduation cap) floating.
educational_3d_tools.usage: Differentials or How it Works section decoration.

unsplash_teacher_helping.usage: Target Audience or Testimonials section context.

unsplash_happy_child.description: Happy child learning at a laptop.
unsplash_happy_child.usage: General social proof or course context.

icons.usage: Use thick stroke width (2px or 2.5px) to maintain the premium feel. Primary icon color should be #C7A562.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use Playfair Display and Work Sans fonts.
Implement the landing page with modular sections mapping directly to the 'page_sections' array above.
Create an Admin Panel route (e.g., /admin) using Shadcn components.
In the Admin Panel, build a toggle list to hide/show sections on the landing page dynamically. Maintain this state securely.
Implement drag-and-drop to reorder sections in the Admin Panel.
Implement forms for editing text content (H1s, paragraphs, testimonials) and uploading images.
Ensure the floating WhatsApp button is absolutely present on all viewports on the landing page.
Strictly follow the color palette. Dark Teal (#0D3B3B) for primary text, Golden Bronze (#C7A562) for CTAs.
Add 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, drag handles).
